dimensions.definition: How a person starts the day when the first hour still has room to set the tone.
dimensions.negative_pole: Slow, hesitant, hard-to-start mornings
what_it_does_not_measure: sleep quality as a medical topic
dimensions.scoring_notes: Score the first movement, not the whole day; avoid turning it into sleep hygiene advice.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Keep the focus before leaving home, and avoid departure prep details.
Do not center evening fatigue or end-of-day reserve.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Helps separate fast starter, soft starter, and warm-up-needed persona tendencies.

dimensions.definition: How someone organizes the moments before leaving home.
dimensions.negative_pole: Scattered, delayed, last-minute departure prep
dimensions.scoring_notes: Judge whether the person wants order first or movement first.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Stay about prep, not steps or thresholds.
Do not turn it into decision-making in general.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Distinguishes prepared planner, move-when-ready, and needs-a-nudge personas.

dimensions.dimension_name: 通院・買い物の切り替え
dimensions.definition: How someone shifts between a necessary appointment and a practical errand.
dimensions.positive_pole: Clean switching, efficient combining, fatigue-aware sequencing
dimensions.negative_pole: Confused, overloaded, resistant to switching tasks
dimensions.scoring_notes: Keep it about switching and load, not about the details of the illness or purchases.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Do not focus on what to buy.
Do not focus on unexpected change.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Differentiates sequential loader, combine-and-go, and fatigue-aware planner personas.

dimensions.definition: How someone decides what should go into the basket first or be left out.
dimensions.positive_pole: Prioritizes function, necessity, and immediate use
dimensions.negative_pole: Drifts, indulges, hesitates, or overbuys
dimensions.scoring_notes: Look for whether the item sorts needs, not whether the person likes shopping.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Stay inside the shopping moment.
Do not center reward or treat value.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Helps separate efficient buyer, comfort buyer, and planned restraint personas.

dimensions.definition: How someone handles movement when rain adds friction.
dimensions.negative_pole: Avoidant, disrupted, annoyed, easily slowed by weather
dimensions.scoring_notes: Score weather adaptation, not weather liking.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Keep it weather-specific rather than threshold-specific.
Do not center schedule change.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Differentiates weather-adaptive, rain-avoidant, and careful-mover personas.

dimensions.definition: How someone manages visible clutter and places items back into order.
dimensions.negative_pole: Mess-tolerant, delayed, reactive, or easily overwhelmed
dimensions.scoring_notes: Judge whether the person wants order now or later; do not make it about cleaning labor.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Stay with clutter and placement, not danger.
Do not add work overload.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Separates order keeper, good-enough organizer, and clutter-accepting personas.

dimensions.definition: How someone notices and responds to small safety conditions at home.
dimensions.negative_pole: Unconcerned, reactive, or blind to small hazards
dimensions.scoring_notes: Score prevention style, not anxiety volume.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Keep it about home conditions rather than movement thresholds.
Do not make it about reassurance-seeking.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Separates safety checker, low-alert home dweller, and prevention-minded personas.

dimensions.definition: How someone handles thresholds, steps, and entry/exit friction.
dimensions.negative_pole: Clumsy, cautious, slowed, or uneasy at thresholds
dimensions.scoring_notes: Keep the scene body-level and local; use concrete thresholds only.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Do not focus on packing or departure prep.
Do not make weather the main cause.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Separates threshold-confident, slow-step, and needs-handhold personas.

dimensions.definition: How someone chooses the tone and timing of replies in LINE-like communication.
dimensions.positive_pole: Prompt, appropriately warm, calibrated reply behavior
dimensions.negative_pole: Cold, delayed, overdone, or avoidant reply behavior
dimensions.scoring_notes: Score tone and timing together; do not overread one emoji.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Stay in message response rather than asking family directly.
Do not make it about distance broadly.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Separates fast responder, measured responder, and warm-but-late responder personas.

dimensions.definition: How someone asks family for a small, practical piece of help or confirmation.
dimensions.positive_pole: Clear, direct, appropriately leaning on family
dimensions.negative_pole: Avoidant, vague, over-independent, or overburdening
dimensions.scoring_notes: Judge whether the ask is small and natural, not whether the family relationship is ideal.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Keep it family-directed rather than reply-directed.
Do not make it about workload stacking.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Separates asks-cleanly, holds-back, and checks-first personas.

dimensions.definition: How someone restores energy when alone and off duty.
dimensions.negative_pole: Empty, restless, or unable to recover alone
dimensions.scoring_notes: Score whether the solitude restores, not whether it is fashionable.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Keep it earlier in the day than the late-day energy tail.
Do not make it reassurance-centric.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Separates quiet restorer, outside-load person, and needs-spare-time personas.

dimensions.definition: How much usable energy remains by the end of the day.
dimensions.positive_pole: Still has some usable energy, can do a small final action
dimensions.negative_pole: Drained, flat, or unable to add anything more
dimensions.scoring_notes: Score remaining usable energy, not total tiredness.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Keep it later in the day.
Do not make it about failure recovery.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Separates evening-capable, evening-fragile, and shutdown-prone personas.

dimensions.definition: How someone responds when a plan changes after it was already set.
dimensions.negative_pole: Resistant, stressed, thrown off, or rigid
dimensions.scoring_notes: Judge response to change itself, not whether the original plan was good.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Keep it about change after a plan exists, not decision habit in general.
Do not focus on departure prep.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Separates adaptable planner, change-sensitive, and plan-protective personas.

dimensions.definition: How someone recovers after a day goes badly or a small mistake lands hard.
dimensions.positive_pole: Self-repairing, gentle reset, quick emotional recovery
dimensions.negative_pole: Self-blaming, stuck, or unable to restart the day
dimensions.scoring_notes: Score the reset move, not the size of the failure.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Keep it after the failure happened.
Do not turn it into a reward question.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Separates recoverer, linger-on-failure, and reset-by-action personas.

dimensions.dimension_name: 仕事と家事の同時進行
dimensions.definition: How someone handles two practical demands at once without losing rhythm.
dimensions.negative_pole: Overloaded, scattered, or forced into one-track mode
dimensions.scoring_notes: Score how the person handles concurrent load, not how hard they work.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Do not make it about appointment-versus-shopping switching.
Do not center tidying alone.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Separates load balancer, single-tasker, and practical juggler personas.

dimensions.definition: How someone shapes the feel of an ordinary weekend.
dimensions.positive_pole: Gentle structure, restorative use of weekend time
dimensions.negative_pole: Aimless, overpacked, or unable to settle into weekend rhythm
dimensions.scoring_notes: Score the weekend feel, not special holiday energy.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Do not make it about alone-time only.
Do not center treat behavior.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Separates restful weekend, active weekend, and drift weekend personas.

dimensions.dimension_name: 小さなご褒美の選び方
dimensions.definition: How someone chooses a small reward after effort or as a mood lift.
dimensions.negative_pole: Excessive, guilt-driven, or unable to choose a reward
dimensions.scoring_notes: Keep it small and daily, not aspirational or status-based.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Do not make it about shopping priority.
Do not make it about failure recovery directly.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Separates small-reward seeker, no-reward minimalist, and measured treat chooser personas.

dimensions.definition: How someone keeps comfortable space with other people in daily life.
dimensions.positive_pole: Calibrated, respectful, neither too close nor too distant
dimensions.negative_pole: Over-involved, withdrawn, or socially awkward in spacing
dimensions.scoring_notes: Score the space between self and others, not friendliness alone.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Do not focus on message timing alone.
Do not make it family-specific.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Separates good-distance keeper, too-close, and too-far personas.

dimensions.definition: How someone gathers reassurance before moving forward or settling down.
dimensions.positive_pole: Uses concrete reassurance, checks facts, settles calmly
dimensions.negative_pole: Needs repeated reassurance, spirals, or cannot settle
dimensions.scoring_notes: Score how reassurance is collected and used, not the amount of worry.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Stay outside hazard checking.
Do not center solitude recovery.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Separates fact checker, comfort seeker, and one-confirmation-person personas.

dimensions.definition: How someone tends to delay, decide, or keep decisions pending.
dimensions.negative_pole: Delaying, deferring, or over-waiting
dimensions.scoring_notes: Judge the pattern of closure, not whether the decision was correct.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Keep it about decision habit rather than changed circumstances.
Do not make it a direct action-vs-observe scene unless the scene is specifically about choice pressure.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Separates decider, waiter, and postponer personas.

dimensions.dimension_name: 動く vs 様子を見る
dimensions.definition: How someone chooses between acting now and watching a little longer.
dimensions.negative_pole: Observe-first, hold-back, delay-for-signal behavior
dimensions.scoring_notes: This is a clean polarity dimension; keep the choice pressure visible.

closest_neighbors_and_drift_guard.guard: Keep it in a concrete moment of action pressure.
Do not make it about a changed plan after the fact.

dimensions.relevance_to_31_persona_framework: Separates action-first, wait-and-watch, and situational mover personas.
